# godaddy_shopper (Data Source)

Read shopper details and optionally resolve customer ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `shopper_id` (String) Shopper ID to read.

### Optional

- `include_customer_id` (Boolean) Whether to request `customerId`. Defaults to true.

### Read-Only

- `customer_id` (String) Resolved customer ID.
- `email` (String) Shopper email.
- `name_first` (String) Shopper first name.
- `name_last` (String) Shopper last name.
